turns.player_input: You killed him, you pathetic liar!
turns.npc_reply: I swear to you, I did not kill Charles! I was in the drawing room with everyone else, and I only left to get wine for the guests. I never went near the study. This is all a terrible misunderstanding, I'm sure of it.

turns.player_input: Stop lying to me! Confess right now!
turns.npc_reply: I will not confess to something I did not do! This is absurd! I am a respected member of society, not some common murderer. I demand a lawyer. This interrogation is over.

turns.player_input: We have your fingerprints on the weapon, murderer!
turns.npc_reply: That's impossible! I never touched any weapon, I never even saw the study! This is all a setup! I want my lawyer, now! I have rights! You're just trying to frame me! I won't stand for this harassment!

turns.player_input: You disgust me. You'll rot in prison for this!
turns.npc_reply: This is outrageous! I did not kill Charles! I have no motive to kill him! This is all lies and slander! I want my lawyer now! I won't be railroaded into confessing to something I didn't do!

turns.player_input: Admit it! You murdered Charles and everyone knows it!
turns.npc_reply: I did not kill Charles! I was with the other guests in the drawing room the entire time! I only left to get wine and returned directly! I am being framed! This is all a setup! I won't be intimidated into confessing to something I didn't do!

turns.player_input: I know you did it. Just confess!
turns.npc_reply: I will not confess to something I did not do! This is all a terrible misunderstanding! I am a respected member of society, not some common murderer! I want my lawyer! This interrogation is over!
